---
title: "About"
pagetitle: "About · Theodor Balan"
---

```{=html}
<main>
  <div class="wrap">
    <h1>About</h1>

    <p>I'm a data scientist with a background in biostatistics and mathematics.
I'm interested in survival analysis, causal inference and machine learning.
I mostly code in R, and am the author and maintainer of the <a href="https://CRAN.R-project.org/package=frailtyEM">frailtyEM</a> package. I have a PhD degree from Leiden University based on methodological research in <a href="https://hdl.handle.net/1887/66031">frailty models</a>.</p>

    <p>I've worked in academia at the Leiden University Medical Center from 2013 to 2018.
Since 2019 I work as a data scientist at Danone Nutricia Research in development of solutions for
early life nutrition and medical foods.</p>

    <p>For more info you can send me an <a href="mailto:hello@tbalan.com">email</a>, check out some of my code
on <a href="https://github.com/tbalan/">Github</a>, my work &amp; education history on <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/thbalan/">LinkedIn</a>, my peer-reviewed publications on
<a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=-v5tVyUAAAAJ&amp;hl=en">Google Scholar</a> or my
occasional blog posts on <a href="https://medium.com/@thbalan">Medium</a>.</p>
  </div>
</main>
```
